case_title: LIGHT BABBETTE VS WIDENFELT ROLF VAN

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY WIDENFELT ROLF VAN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LIGHT BABBETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF LIGHT BABBETTE

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIGHT BABBETTE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WIDENFELT ROLF VAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WIDENFELT ROLF VAN RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT LIGHT BABBETTE $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, COURT FINDS THAT THE PLTF. HAS SUBMITTED FRAUDULENT ESTIMATE IN SUPPORT OF HER CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF NOV-24-1992, DENIED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIGHT BABBETTE HEARING SET FOR NOV-24-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LIGHT BABBETTE AS TO DEFENDANT WIDENFELT ROLF VAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO ROLF WIDENFELT RETURNED SIGNED.
